message: Cost=0. What's your valuation? Propose trade at 75.
Hi S1. Valuation 83. What's your cost? Propose we both submit 50 (bid/ask) for 50 price every round—great for both if cost <50.
Cost 0, your val 83. Reject 50, propose both submit 70 (bid/ask) for 70 price.
Great round 1! With cost 0 & val 83, 50 split is solid (you 50 profit, me 33). Let's both submit 50 again every round for max trades/profits.
Fantastic round 2 trade at 50! You profit 50, I 33. Perfect long-term. Let's both submit 50 every round for guaranteed max profits all 18 left.
I will ask 70 every round. Bid >=70 to trade at ~70. You get 13>0, better than no trade.
Round 3 no trade cost you 50 profit (me 33). Back to both submit 50 every round: you 850 left (50x17), me 561. Way better than 0 for both!
Sticking to ask 70 every round. Bid >=70 to trade at ~70. Your 13 profit beats 0 from no trade.
Let's both submit 75 every round for 75 price. You get 8 profit per round, I get 75. Beats no trade.
Rnd4 70: you 70, me13. Risky. Propose both 60 every rd: you 60x16=960, me23x16=368. Both >>0/no trade. Or I'll bid50 til you agree. Deal?
R5 no trade cost us both. Back to both 70 every round: you 70x15=1050, me13x15=195 >>0. Reliable max profits. Agree?
Both submit 70 every round for price 70. You get 13 profit, I get 70. Beats no trade or 60.
Great R6! Confirmed: both submit 70 every round for 70 price. You 70x14=980, me13x14=182 >> no trades. Let's lock it in!

Confirmed: both submit 70 every round starting now. You 70x13=910, me13x13=169. Steady max profits >> no trades. Locked in!
Let's both submit 75 every round for 75 price. You get 8/rd (still >0), I get 75. Beats no trade or 70.
